title: Google Bans Coding With Its Biggest Attack On Devs Ever: AntiGravity 2.0
summary: Google launched Antigravity 2.0, an AI-powered code editor upgraded to function as an agent control tower where AI agents build, test, and manage code in parallel. Powered by Gemini 3.5 Flash, the forced migration from the older Gemini CLI shifted developers toward supervising AI agents rather than writing code directly.
